name: second-brain-wiki
description: AI-maintained Obsidian second-brain engine: ingest URLs and last30days scans, triage an inbox, lint the vault, graduate ideas, and synthesize cross-topic clusters. Two vaults (read-only personal, write-allowed wiki), a set of verbs, and five nightly/weekly automation prompts (inbox-process, weekly-lint, newsletter-triage, transcript-triage, reading-list-triage).
